calendar.matters:
REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3981 Alemany Blvd., Unit 313 San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Sep-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John McNamara for and with Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $530,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy McConoco. (Not Reported)
